items.title: Solana Institute CEO says CLARITY Act must shield open-source developers
items.whyYouShouldCare: The CLARITY Act's potential protections for open-source developers could enhance Solana's ecosystem by fostering innovation and attracting more developers to the platform.

items.title: Backpack US appoints former SEC Acting Chairman Piwowar to board amid push for crypto perps
items.whyYouShouldCare: The appointment of Piwowar to Backpack US's board could signal increased regulatory engagement, impacting Solana's market positioning and liquidity as crypto derivatives evolve.

items.title: Zcash, Hyperliquid tokens lead losses as traders bet against a bitcoin bounce
items.whyYouShouldCare: The decline of Zcash and Hyperliquid tokens indicates a bearish sentiment that could affect overall market confidence, potentially impacting Solana's trading volumes and liquidity.
